member.name: M:WorldNewzWebAPI.Controllers.BingNewsController.GetBingNews(System.String)
member.summary: Fetches news articles from Bing News Search API.
member.returns: JSON response containing Bing news results.

member.name: P:WorldNewzWebAPI.Models.NewsQueryContext.Source
member.summary: Source specification (e.g. "duckduckgo", "news", "all"). Only used by Search.

member.name: M:NewsController.Search(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Search news articles. Now seamlessly maps DDG usage to the working Active API provider. Returns { results: [...] } matching the UI's SearchPage expectation.
